title: Using AI to outsmart drug-resistant bacteria
summary: Ben Luisi and Cambridge researchers use AlphaFold, Gemini, and Co-Scientist to decode bacterial defense mechanisms and accelerate antibiotic discovery. The AI-driven approach compresses years of structural biology work into minutes, addressing the antimicrobial resistance crisis.
